action.reasoning: Observation: 80M U-Net achieved Z500 RMSE=498.8 at epoch 5, then overfit badly (538.3 by epoch 24). Training loss kept decreasing while val RMSE increased - classic overfitting. Analysis: Model has too much capacity for the training data size (stride=2 gives ~27k samples). No dropout, no lat-weighted training loss, and LR decayed to near-zero wasting epochs 15-24. Decision: 1) Add dropout=0.15 to model, 2) Use stride=1 (2x data), 3) Use lat-weighted MSE loss during training, 4) Increase LR to 3e-4 with proper warmup+cosine, 5) Add noise augmentation, 6) Early stopping with patience=15, 7) Save EMA weights as best checkpoint. Train for up to 60 epochs.
